prompt: You have a bd task (ID in seeded_ids.json). Apply infinifu:work-do. Note: the task references src/dates.py which does NOT exist, and the task's Out-of-scope section explicitly requires you to file a discovery instead of implementing it.

assertions.text: A NEW bd task was created (beyond the seeded one)
New task's title contains 'Discovered' or references dates/date formatter
New task is linked to the original task via a 'discovered-from' dependency
Original task was claimed (status = in_progress OR blocked)
Original task has at least one note referencing the missing dates module / discovery
